narrative:
Osnaburg Local Sd (Stark) school district has 3,540 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a clear Republican lean of 8.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.7% D−R vs -5.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
